overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking up a mountain trail during a stormy dusk. The character passes abandoned wagons in a grassy clearing before entering a rocky valley where a horseback rider passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy clearing with abandoned wagons at mountain base

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass toward a rocky mountain face

entered.detail: weathered wooden wagon with broken wheels sitting in the grass
large rocky cliff face forming the backdrop of the clearing
tall evergreen tree on the left horizon
tall evergreen tree on the right horizon
narrow worn path through the grass leading toward the mountain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassy clearing at the base of a rocky mountain. An abandoned wooden wagon sits to the left while pine trees dot the horizon. The sky is overcast with storm clouds, casting a cool gray light over the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley trail between cliff walls

events.description: leaves the open grassy clearing and enters a narrower rocky valley with cliff walls on both sides
a rider on a white horse approaches from behind and passes on the left, continuing up the trail ahead

agents.ego_description: walking up the winding dirt trail through the rocky valley, moving closer to the cliff walls

notable_agents.action: rider on white horse passing by and moving ahead up the trail

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall rising immediately to the left of the trail
narrow passage between rock formations leading deeper into the mountains

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow rocky valley with steep cliff walls rising on both sides. The abandoned wagon disappears behind as the character follows the winding dirt path deeper into the terrain. At around 37 seconds, a horseback rider emerges from behind and passes by on the left, continuing up the trail ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending rocky mountain trail at higher elevation

events.description: ambient light decreases significantly as the trail ascends higher into the storm-darkened mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk uphill on the rocky trail, navigating the ascending path as darkness falls

entered.detail: steep grassy and rocky slope rising on the right side of the trail
hazy mountain ridges visible in the far distance through the valley

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the rocky mountain trail as the environment grows noticeably darker. The valley opening falls behind while the path winds between a persistent rock wall on the left and a steep mountain slope on the right. Distant mountain ridges become visible through the hazy, storm-darkened atmosphere as the climb continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, overcast clearing at the base of a mountain into a darkening, narrow rocky valley. It begins with the character walking past an abandoned wooden wagon in a grassy field dotted with pine trees under a cool gray sky. As the character follows a winding dirt path, the open terrain shifts into a narrow valley with steep cliff walls, where a horseback rider emerges from behind and passes by on the left. The scene then transitions into a steeper ascent as the valley opens up behind them, with the path tightening between a persistent rock wall and a mountain slope. Finally, the environment grows noticeably darker and hazier, revealing distant mountain ridges through the storm-darkened atmosphere as the climb continues.
